meaning: n.干草堆,谷堆v.刈,扫除,收割庄稼,扫倒
examples: Ten men went to mow a meadow.
Who's going to mow the lawn?
I mow the lawn every week in summer.
Outside contractors have been let go, so Nucor employees now mow lawns and clean bathrooms.
Under services there could be requests for someone to mow a lawn, contractors or house cleaners.
